title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Phoenix Mills

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Phoenix Mills
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Phoenix Mills in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Phoenix Mills:
Phoenix Mills is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Phoenix Mills!
